name: Light Vegetable Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Cook noodles according to package directions.
2. Drain the cooked noodles and coat a 13 X 9 X 2-inch baking dish with nonstick vegetable oil cooking spray.
3. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add squashes, sweet peppers, broccoli flowerets, garlic, and thyme. Cover; cook for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp, stirring occasionally. Pour off any liquid. Sprinkle salt over the vegetables and stir to combine.
4. Prepare Cheese Mixture: Beat eggs in a large bowl until blended. Stir in ricotta, cottage cheese, basil, red-pepper seasoning, and dried thyme until blended.
5. Line prepared pan with 3 noodles. Spread 2 cups of cheese mixture on top; cover with 3 noodles. Spread 3 cups of vegetable mixture on top. Sprinkle 1 cup mozzarella. Cover with 3 noodles and spread with the remaining cheese mixture. Top with the remaining vegetables and sprinkle with the remaining mozzarella.
6. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven for 1 hour or until heated through. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes before serving. Garnish with fresh thyme sprigs.
